Flat concept inventory:
- LLM-based Text-to-SQL | papers: 3ff5f99c7924b4b28669f09ce3bfbf26fd92abc1; 0b3863c21a7fb5ac61a447611cba0ec9ce1ab4a4; 84b26030b648b6d79177bdafd3e896b1dda9f91e; a40693eefd351659cdeb3885917b1506ea01c38a; - Methods | papers: 2d765d953efd738034782f9afdb311e3ba015edd; 9e3c493fb09dcd61bb05e8c5659f23327b7b6340; e034b664362640cc88dfa5e2e11c0524fc7cb323; 8f831f341e959955a495730d81996e62c57cc0bd; 6034a1ed44de01ffc18cd2265223ed2bf1d216cd; 51000d9f79be0eefd7972fe94e3c71dddc90d2c6; bf11f01929afed0ad3ccfe1b5e0fd34d90ef2b4f; f727986a460a33b9e62ac23f7d8901748e5c10c9; ff3dbed244fc5f1787a9f92a6b91be27855d4adc; d7665e28f59f49acfc34a0eaa3716eedad039f9b; 6cfcdf82ee19afb9cb5cfa9452d195bd03e3c3be; 08dd8304a74f6c98e3d592a565458549ddbb3cd6; cc0f0cb09a73f82ed44d900f5ca710bec784acc1; e0e1fcdbc5b41fcd1cd15001b4861a738411c910; 68ad0ed1e21fd9fd7b2bd58769d8bec88c996b01; 405030fdaa44687c5495437dd6c5d1db7010fa3f; 01de0020c6a0f2d0aa73965e8dcfd9b8f38e05b6; 3265df2c0bdf3a0d68e498fcb38fad6199399b6a; 024c9fe5a0e00786683d64ec32d142aaaae55fa2; fcca8e6a17d6045ec241b9a35e141efaeb892f6f; 43f0b39bc787311b22e0a8659780743cb54a67be; e2751c2030d1497b5f99ee2e08e733043a15bffe; 27961ae80ad008bd4006704b1b8fa82664137d69; 8334cab3749f83b09679e955f4794d132c60b24c; 191e300e381d4128b749d16fe3d83c8643a3bd1f; eaac325e94e76d86acfcd6ffea76d47abf86fbe4; e0f27336698c84709bd60b6b7f4ce588cbae66bf; 2d125b26788e41586fa1594da60169f33fb481f0; ac2fc8c5d4a1f44464f1415ea3dd3ed45398b9d9; 59fe7cb560651281cfc5db6b8940da0e3ba9dea6; 47e15941c8b157873c8264e4bf50318d1ba5cd18; a1849a77644ff411a03833b5aa7a65ff57158c50; 978040c55f9094212d15b7ffadfab1440913b6cf; 72c73d5fdf1e67a566cd534336d76b754bafdebd; 07de76b2862cf7738b3fd28aabd708186231a527
- In-context Learning Paradigm | papers: 2d765d953efd738034782f9afdb311e3ba015edd; 9e3c493fb09dcd61bb05e8c5659f23327b7b6340; e034b664362640cc88dfa5e2e11c0524fc7cb323; 8f831f341e959955a495730d81996e62c57cc0bd; 6034a1ed44de01ffc18cd2265223ed2bf1d216cd; 51000d9f79be0eefd7972fe94e3c71dddc90d2c6; bf11f01929afed0ad3ccfe1b5e0fd34d90ef2b4f; f727986a460a33b9e62ac23f7d8901748e5c10c9; ff3dbed244fc5f1787a9f92a6b91be27855d4adc; d7665e28f59f49acfc34a0eaa3716eedad039f9b; 6cfcdf82ee19afb9cb5cfa9452d195bd03e3c3be; 08dd8304a74f6c98e3d592a565458549ddbb3cd6; cc0f0cb09a73f82ed44d900f5ca710bec784acc1; e0e1fcdbc5b41fcd1cd15001b4861a738411c910; 68ad0ed1e21fd9fd7b2bd58769d8bec88c996b01; 405030fdaa44687c5495437dd6c5d1db7010fa3f; 01de0020c6a0f2d0aa73965e8dcfd9b8f38e05b6; 3265df2c0bdf3a0d68e498fcb38fad6199399b6a; 024c9fe5a0e00786683d64ec32d142aaaae55fa2; fcca8e6a17d6045ec241b9a35e141efaeb892f6f; 43f0b39bc787311b22e0a8659780743cb54a67be; e2751c2030d1497b5f99ee2e08e733043a15bffe; 27961ae80ad008bd4006704b1b8fa82664137d69; 8334cab3749f83b09679e955f4794d132c60b24c; 191e300e381d4128b749d16fe3d83c8643a3bd1f; eaac325e94e76d86acfcd6ffea76d47abf86fbe4; e0f27336698c84709bd60b6b7f4ce588cbae66bf; 2d125b26788e41586fa1594da60169f33fb481f0; ac2fc8c5d4a1f44464f1415ea3dd3ed45398b9d9; 59fe7cb560651281cfc5db6b8940da0e3ba9dea6; 47e15941c8b157873c8264e4bf50318d1ba5cd18
